message:
Propagate CompatConfig through provider factory with custom header injection

Wire CompatConfig from model entries through the provider factory into
all five provider implementations, enabling per-provider/per-model
behavioral overrides and custom HTTP headers.

src/providers/mod.rs:
- All five create_provider code paths (Anthropic, OpenAI Completions,
  OpenAI Responses, Cohere, Gemini) now call .with_compat() to pass
  CompatConfig into each provider instance
- Tests verifying compat acceptance for each variant and fallback routes

src/providers/anthropic.rs:
- compat field + with_compat() builder
- Custom headers injected after standard headers but before per-request
  StreamOptions headers during stream()
- build_request and AnthropicRequest made public for backward-lock testing
- Tests for custom header injection and compat=None no-op

src/providers/openai.rs:
- Full compat override support: system_role_name (e.g. "developer"),
  supports_tools (can suppress tool serialization), max_tokens_field
  (switches between max_tokens and max_completion_tokens),
  supports_usage_in_streaming (controls include_usage)
- build_messages_with_role() accepts configurable system role name
- build_request and OpenAIRequest made public

src/providers/openai_responses.rs, cohere.rs, gemini.rs:
- Same pattern: compat field, with_compat() builder, custom header
  injection, public build_request/request structs
- Gemini: streaming_url also made public

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
